sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90839" key="prumnhtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρυμν-ητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>,= <sense id="n90839.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρυμνήσιος, ἄφλαστα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1240.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Callix.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl></cit>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n90839.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-κή, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">poop-awning, PCair. Zen.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1240.tlg001:54:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">54.4</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1240.tlg001:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(iii B.C.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
